canonical_question: What are NetSuite SuiteScript 2.x governance limits - units per script type, API costs, Map/Reduce?
aliases: SuiteScript governance units limit per script type
NetSuite SuiteScript API usage unit costs record.load record.save search
SuiteScript Map/Reduce governance limits phases concurrency
NetSuite scheduled script governance yield remaining usage

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: 2026.1 — N/llm module added (100 units per generateText call)

constraints: Governance limits per-script-invocation — exceeding terminates immediately with SSS_USAGE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
User Event scripts get only 1,000 units — record.load (10) + record.save (20) on transaction = 30 units
Map/Reduce has per-phase hard limits (getInputData: 10K, map: 1K, reduce: 5K, summarize: 10K)
HTTP/HTTPS requests cost 10 units each — User Event can make max ~100 external calls
SuiteScript 2.1 and 2.0 have identical governance costs — 2.1 adds ES6 syntax only
Total persisted data for Map/Reduce cannot exceed 200 MB

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Need SuiteTalk SOAP/REST API rate limits (concurrent users, request throttling)
Need NetSuite REST API (RESTful web services, not SuiteScript RESTlets)
Need Token-Based Authentication or OAuth 2.0 setup for NetSuite

inputs_needed.question: Which SuiteScript script type are you using?
What type of NetSuite record are you working with?
options: Transaction record (Invoice, Sales Order, Purchase Order)

inputs_needed.question: How many records need processing per execution?
